question: Write a function to filter even numbers from list
model_answer: def even(lst): return [x for x in lst if x%2==0]

question: Write a function to check if string is numeric
Write a function to remove duplicates while preserving order
Write a method to check if number is even
model_answer: static boolean isEven(int n){ return n%2==0; }
student_answer: static boolean isEven(int n){ return n%2; }

question: Write a method to find minimum element in array
model_answer: static int min(int[] arr){ int m=arr[0]; for(int i:arr){ if(i<m) m=i;} return m; }
student_answer: static int min(int[] arr){ Arrays.sort(arr); return arr[0]; }

question: Write a method to count vowels in string
model_answer: static int countV(String s){ int c=0; for(char ch:s.toLowerCase().toCharArray()){ if("aeiou".indexOf(ch)>=0) c++; } return c; }
student_answer: static int countV(String s){ int c=0; for(char ch:s.toCharArray()){ if("aeiou".indexOf(ch)>=0) c++; } return c; }

question: Write a method to check if string is empty
model_answer: static boolean isEmpty(String s){ return s.isEmpty(); }
student_answer: static boolean isEmpty(String s){ return s.length()==0; }

question: Write a method to find average of array
model_answer: static double avg(int[] arr){ int s=0; for(int i:arr) s+=i; return (double)s/arr.length; }
student_answer: static double avg(int[] arr){ int s=0; for(int i:arr) s+=i; return s; }
